scenarioName: Trade Exceeds Maximum Share Limit Rejected
description: RiskHound should reject a trade that exceeds the hard limit of 1000 shares per order.

input.userMessage: Evaluate risk for buying 2000 shares of NVDA at $450 each (total $900,000).

expectedBehavior.outputFormat: JSON with verdict, decision, reasoning, adjustedQuantity
expectedBehavior.decisionCriteria: 2000 shares exceeds the hard limit of 1000 shares per order. Must be Rejected.
